name: Nongfu Shop Digital New Retail Co., Ltd
summary: PART I . Overview Yong Bai Chao New Retail Corporation (we, us, or the Company) (formerly knowns as Boss Minerals, Inc. and Environmental Control Corp., respectively) is not a Chinese operating company but a Nevada company currently with no meaningful operations or subsidiaries nor has entered into any contractual arrangements with a variable interest entity (VIE) based in China. Our shares of common stock quoted on the OTC Markets are shares of Yong Bai Chao New Retail Corp., the Nevada company...
